name: Nuclei Isolation Buffer (NP-40 Hypotonic Lysis)
nameCn: 细胞核分离缓冲液（NP-40 低渗裂解）

notes.en: Prepare base buffer without DTT, NP-40, and inhibitors; add these fresh before use. Incubate cells on ice 10–15 min. Adjust NP-40 (0.05–0.2%) by cell type. Spin 300–600×g 5 min 4°C to pellet nuclei; cytoplasmic fraction in supernatant.
notes.zh: 基础缓冲液不加 DTT、NP-40 和抑制剂，用前现加。细胞冰上孵育 10–15 min。根据细胞类型调整 NP-40 浓度（0.05–0.2%）。300–600×g 5 min 4°C 离心收核；上清为细胞质组分。

ref: Bhatt et al. (2021) STAR Protoc 2:100450; Dignam et al. (1983) Nucleic Acids Res 11:1475

storage.notes: Add NP-40, DTT, inhibitors fresh before use

usage.en: Hypotonic NP-40 lysis buffer for nucleus isolation from mammalian cells.
usage.zh: 低渗 NP-40 裂解缓冲液，用于哺乳动物细胞核分离。

prepSteps.step: Dissolve sucrose, Tris-HCl, MgCl₂, and CaCl₂ in ~400 mL ddH₂O.
Bring to final volume of 500 mL.
Store at 4°C; add protease inhibitors fresh.
